nasb.text: And he took about 5,000 men and set them in ambush between Bethel and Ai, on the west side of the city.

esv.text: He took about 5,000 men and set them in ambush between Bethel and Ai, to the west of the city.

cnv.text: 約書亞挑了大約五千人，要他們埋伏在伯特利和艾城中間，就是艾城的西面。

ccb.text: 约书亚选了五千人，让他们埋伏在艾城和伯特利之间，就是艾城的西面。
